_comment: Two-tier merge policy — consumed by merge-on-command.yml (read from MAIN,
never from the PR head, so a PR cannot reclassify its own paths).
Rules are evaluated per changed file, FIRST MATCH WINS (fnmatch globs).
A PR's class is the STRICTEST class of any changed file: one 'human' file
makes the whole PR human-approval. Files matching no rule default to
'human' (safe default) — the catch-all '**' auto rule below makes that
auto  — the PM (manta-agent[bot]) may /merge on green without a human.
human — only @antoinedc's /merge passes; the PM must request approval.
POLICY (2026-07-02, by owner request): the PM drives merges END-TO-END.
Human class is reserved ONLY for gate integrity: .github/** (the merge/CI
workflows + this policy file — a PR that can rewrite the gate bypasses
it) and .gitleaks.toml (secret-scan config). Everything else — all app
code, server security surfaces, scripts, manifests, agent docs — is
auto: reviewer PASS + green required checks is the whole bar.
